title: Trading Post Resaturated GUI
description: Replaces the default villager GUI textures as well as the Trading Post textures to fit the Recolourful HUD theme
body: The Trading Post GUI looks kind of boring, especially when you have the Recolourful HUD and GUI resource pack installed. This resource pack changes that, bringing more color to your Trading Post GUI. Be warned, this will change the villager GUI as well since the mod uses the vanilla texture.
